description_long: This storage locker is a rectangular, metal-framed structure with a corrugated, dark teal exterior and a flat roof. The sides and roof are clad in vertically ribbed metal panels, providing both durability and weather resistance. The front is open, revealing a set of wooden shelving units inside, which are filled with various items, likely books or media cases. The frame is constructed from sturdy metal tubing, and the shelving appears to be made from unfinished wood. There are no visible doors, handles, or locking mechanisms, and the structure is partially open on the front and sides. The overall design suggests it is intended for outdoor use, possibly as a community book exchange or storage unit in a public space.
description: A rectangular, metal-framed storage locker with ribbed teal metal panels and open wooden shelving inside, designed for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ribbed metal panel exterior and partial view of the wooden shelves inside.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full height of the ribbed metal back panel, with no openings or features visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with ribbed metal paneling and a glimpse of the interior shelving.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the open entrance, metal frame, and wooden shelves filled with items.
